title: Docker Ignore
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries a `.dockerignore` file that lists patterns for files and directories to exclude from the Docker build context. Excluding unnecessary files reduces build times and prevents sensitive data from entering container images.

## When to use
Use `media:dockerignore;textable;list` when a pipeline node reads, generates, or audits a `.dockerignore` file — for example, a build optimization step that recommends exclusion patterns based on a project's file layout.

## Notes
The pattern syntax is similar to `.gitignore` but not identical; Docker applies patterns relative to the build context root and has its own negation and wildcard rules. See also [Docker Ignore](https://capdag.com/browse/media:dockerignore;textable;list).
